prose:
Formaldehyde gas‐phase dipole moment
Property: dipole magnitude (Debye)
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) using the xtb backend
Geometry provenance: supplied XYZ (no further optimization; single-point electrostatics)
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no continuum model)
Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell)
Software: xtb 6.x via chemkit electrostatics skill
Convergence: SCF self-consistent; integrity check passed (partial charges sum to total charge within tolerance). No warnings were reported.

Headline result: μ = 2.4870753 D

Live log and result JSON were written during the run (available on request); the calculation command is recorded in the cli_invocation field above.
